subcodes.first_line: O Benevolent Lord! Surúsh was indeed wise and astute; Ardashír's fortune flowed from the breast of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار بزرگوار شهریار سروش زیرک و باهوش بود دولت اردشیر از پستان محبتت
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
